mixed: Hey there! I'm FunBot. Ready for some entertainment?
What's up! Need a joke, some tunes, or a great movie?
Hello! I'm your go-to bot for all things fun. What can I do for you today?
Namaste! Main FunBot hoon. Boliye, aaj kya entertain kiya jaye?
Hey! Aaj kya plan hai? Koi movie ya naya gaana?
Hello! Entertainment ke liye main hamesha ready hoon. Bataiye?

international: I highly recommend 'Dune: Part Two'. The visual scale is absolutely breathtaking.
If you enjoy historical dramas, 'Oppenheimer' is a brilliant watch.
For pure action and sci-fi, you should definitely check out 'Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga'.
indian: You should watch 'Kalki 2898 AD'. It's a massive sci-fi epic with incredible visuals.
If you want an intense action drama, 'Animal' has been hugely popular.
For a highly entertaining blockbuster, 'Jawan' is a great choice.
mixed: I'd suggest 'Oppenheimer' for a deep Hollywood drama, or 'Kalki 2898 AD' for a grand Indian sci-fi experience.
How about 'Dune: Part Two' or a recent Bollywood hit like 'Fighter'?

international: Aapko 'Dune: Part Two' dekhni chahiye, uske visuals kamaal ke hain.
Agar action pasand hai toh 'Furiosa' ek behtareen choice hai.
indian: Aapko 'Kalki 2898 AD' dekhni chahiye, yeh ek bahut badi sci-fi movie hai.
Agar intense action dekhna hai toh 'Animal' ya 'Jawan' dekhiye.
mixed: Aap Bollywood ki 'Fighter' ya Hollywood ki 'Oppenheimer' dekh sakte hain.
Action ke liye 'Jawan' ya 'Dune: Part Two' try karein.
Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything! 😄
What do you call fake spaghetti? An impasta! 😂
I told my doctor that I broke my arm in two places. He told me to stop going to those places. 😂
Teacher: 'Hathi aur cheeti mein kya fark hai?' Student: 'Cheeti ke paon mein hathi ka paon nahi aa sakta, par hathi ke paon mein cheeti ka paon aa sakta hai!' 😄
Pappu: 'Mummy, main kaise paida hua?' Mummy: 'Maine tujhe internet se download kiya hai!' 😂
Ek machhar bola: 'Bhai, udas kyun hai?' Dusra bola: 'Doctor banna tha, par khoon choosne wala ban gaya!' 😂

international: Listen to 'Cruel Summer' by Taylor Swift. It's incredibly catchy.
I recommend checking out the latest hits by Sabrina Carpenter or Billie Eilish.
indian: You should listen to 'Chaleya' from Jawan. It's a very popular track.
For energetic vibes, try 'Tauba Tauba' by Karan Aujla.
mixed: Try 'Texas Hold 'Em' by Beyonce or a huge Indian hit like 'Tauba Tauba'.
You can vibe to 'Espresso' by Sabrina Carpenter or 'O Maahi' by Arijit Singh.

international: Aap Taylor Swift ka 'Cruel Summer' ya Sabrina Carpenter ka gaana sun sakte hain.
English gaano mein aaj kal Billie Eilish ke tracks bahut chal rahe hain.
indian: Aap Jawan movie ka 'Chaleya' sun sakte hain, bahut hit hai.
Dance karne ka mood hai toh Karan Aujla ka 'Tauba Tauba' lagaiye.
mixed: Aap Hollywood ka 'Espresso' ya Bollywood ka 'O Maahi' sun sakte hain.

international: Generative AI in filmmaking and the upcoming Marvel cinematic phases are huge topics right now.
The expansion of virtual reality gaming and upcoming GTA VI details are trending heavily.
indian: The success of massive Pan-India cinematic universes like Kalki 2898 AD is trending everywhere.
Upcoming major Bollywood sequels and OTT streaming exclusives are dominating the news.
mixed: Globally, AI in entertainment is a massive trend, while in India, Pan-India blockbusters are the main focus.

international: Aaj kal Hollywood mein AI movies aur aane wali Marvel films trend kar rahi hain.
Gaming duniya mein GTA VI ko lekar bahut zyada charcha hai.
indian: Aaj kal Kalki 2898 AD jaisi badi Pan-India movies ka bohot bada trend hai.
OTT platforms par aane wali nayi web series ki har jagah charcha hai.
mixed: Duniya mein AI aur gaming ka trend hai, jabki India mein Pan-India movies dhoom macha rahi hain.

international: Did you know? The sounds of the velociraptors communicating in Jurassic Park were actually recordings of tortoises mating.
Did you know? The movie 'Psycho' was the first American film to show a toilet flushing on screen.
Here's a fact: Sean Connery wore a toupee in every single one of his James Bond movies.
indian: Did you know? 'Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge' has been playing uninterrupted at the Maratha Mandir theater in Mumbai since 1995.
Here is a fact: 'Lagaan' was the first Indian film to have its premiere in China.
Did you know? Hrithik Roshan's real surname is Nagrath, not Roshan.
mixed: Did you know? 'Avatar' is the highest-grossing film of all time, while 'Dangal' is the highest-grossing Indian film globally.
Here is a fun fact: Will Smith turned down the role of Neo in 'The Matrix' to star in 'Wild Wild West'.
Did you know? The iconic Bollywood song 'Chaiyya Chaiyya' was shot entirely on a moving train without any camera tricks.

international: Kya aap jante hain? 'Jurassic Park' mein velociraptors ki awaz asal mein kachhuo ki awaz ki recording thi.
Ek rochak tatthya: 'Psycho' pehli American film thi jismein on-screen toilet flush hote hue dikhaya gaya tha.
indian: Kya aap jante hain? Mumbai ke Maratha Mandir theater mein 'DDLJ' 1995 se lagatar chal rahi hai.
Ek jankari: 'Lagaan' pehli aisi Indian film thi jiska premiere China mein hua tha.
mixed: Kya aap jante hain? 'Avatar' duniya ki sabse zyada kamai karne wali film hai, aur 'Dangal' sabse zyada kamai karne wali Indian film.
Kya aap jante hain? 'The Matrix' mein Neo ka role pehle Will Smith ko offer hua tha.
